## Recommended Next Work Slice
Fix the grep pattern in the security scan command to properly detect API keys like `DASHSCOPE_API_KEY=[REDACTED]` using a correct regular expression.

## Suggested Commands
```bash
grep -rE 'DASHSCOPE_API_KEY=[a-zA-Z0-9]{32}' .
grep -rE 'OPENAI_API_KEY=[a-zA-Z0-9]{40}' .
```
